headline: Crown Castle Q1 AFFO & Sales Beat Estimates Despite DISH Headwinds
summary: CCI beats Q1 AFFO and revenue estimates despite DISH-related headwinds, as leasing trends hold steady and strategic restructuring and asset sales plans stay on track.
